---
title: Indicators
toc: false
---

This section presents compact environmental indicators for policy and planning audiences, including regional councils, local authorities, and environmental consultancies.

::: {.indicator-grid}
::: {.indicator-card}
### Water Consents Dashboard

A compact view of consented freshwater takes by use type and source, with map context for where takes are located.

[Open indicator](01-water-consents.qmd)

::: {.indicator-meta}
<span class="chip chip-watch">Freshwater</span>
<span class="chip">Consent records</span>
<span class="chip">Northland focus</span>
:::
:::

::: {.indicator-card}
### Freshwater Habitat Quality

Interactive summary of habitat quality scores, dominant landcover context, and site-level distribution.

[Open indicator](02-freshwater-habitat.qmd)

::: {.indicator-meta}
<span class="chip chip-good">Habitat condition</span>
<span class="chip">Site monitoring</span>
<span class="chip">Multi-region</span>
:::
:::

::: {.indicator-card}
### Groundwater Quality Trends

Exploration view of long-term groundwater quality data structure and measured variables.

[Open indicator](03-groundwater-trends.qmd)

::: {.indicator-meta}
<span class="chip chip-risk">Groundwater quality</span>
<span class="chip">1964-2014 state</span>
<span class="chip">Trend context</span>
:::
:::

::: {.indicator-card}
### River Water Quality Nitrogen Trends

Exploration view of river nitrogen trend records by period, direction, and site geography.

[Open indicator](04-river-water-quality.qmd)

::: {.indicator-meta}
<span class="chip chip-watch">River quality</span>
<span class="chip">1991-2020 trends</span>
<span class="chip">Nitrogen focus</span>
:::
:::

:::


::: {.callout-note}
## Source and transparency
All pages include a Methods and source section and a collapsed code block so readers can inspect the exact analysis steps.
:::
